name: Sofia Connect
notes:
Sofia Connect (AS47872) — wholesale carrier for Southeast Europe
and the Caucasus. DWDM wavelengths, IP transit, Ethernet L2VPN
and dark fibre.

Peering policy: OPEN
─────────────────────────────────────────────
• Bi-lateral peering welcome at DE-CIX Frankfurt, GR-IX Athens
  and MegaIX Sofia.
• Route-server peering accepted at all three IXPs.
• Requirements: RPKI ROV, IRR filtering (AS-SOFIA-CONNECT),
  max-prefix limits, 24/7 NOC.

Contacts
─────────────────────────────────────────────
NOC    : noc@sofia-connect.net    +359 2 420 0300 (24/7)
Peering: peering@sofia-connect.net
Abuse  : abuse@sofia-connect.net

Looking Glass: https://sofia-connect.net/looking-glass/
Status page  : https://sofia-connect.net/status/
Website      : https://sofia-connect.net
